mapper.select: select fk.id, fk.name as fee_key_name, fv.fee_key_id, fv.name, fv.is_deleted, fv.unit from fee_value fv left join fee_key fk on fv.fee_key_id = fk.id and fk.is_deleted = 0 where fv.id in (select fee_value_id from apartment_fee_value where apartment_id = (select apartment_id from room_info where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0) and is_deleted = 0) and fv.is_deleted = 0
